description:
Offered: Spring semesters concurrent with the Practicum
This course is taken in conjunction with the practicum. Using peer collaboration and self-reflection, teacher candidates explore strategies to improve instruction, promote positive student behavior and social-emotional growth, and provide leadership at a school-wide level. The course also serves as a culminating experience in which candidates produce a Teacher Work Sample (TWS), a multi-step performance assessment that models the planning-teaching-assessment cycle of the professional educator, and that provides evidence of the candidate’s readiness to teach. Cross-listed with CHEM 4012 , ENGL 4012 , HIST 4012 , MATH 4012 , ENGT 4012 and SCI 4012
Prerequisite(s): Stage II Review.
